name: ExecuteTasksLoop
description: Reads one canonical task tracker, executes one eligible task, persists the tracker update, and stops with the resulting task outcome.

steps.name: readTracker
steps.description: Load the tracker path for this run, validate the tracker, and initialize task execution state.

steps.name: selectNextTask
steps.description: Choose the single eligible task for this run, or stop early when the tracker is complete or blocked.

steps.name: reviewSelectedTask
steps.description: Recheck the selected task against the current tracker state and mark it in progress before meaningful work begins.

steps.name: executeSelectedTask
steps.description: Perform the selected task's repository work and capture a concise execution report.
steps.promptTemplate:
Execute exactly one tracker task using the context below. Do the minimum repository and document changes needed to satisfy only this task's stated done-condition. Read any additional files you need before changing code. Do not start unrelated work from later tasks. After making changes, return a concise markdown report using this exact structure.

# Task Execution Result

## Task
<task number and title>

## Files Changed
- <path or `None`>

## Summary
<what changed>

## Verification Notes
- <evidence tied to the done-condition or `None`>

Selected task:
{SelectedTask}

steps.name: verifySelectedTask
steps.description: Compare the execution report to the task's done-condition and decide whether the task is complete or blocked.
steps.promptTemplate:
Review the selected task and the execution result. Decide whether the task's done-condition is satisfied. Respond using this exact markdown structure and do not include any other headings.

# Verification Result

- Outcome: TASK_COMPLETED or TASK_BLOCKED
- Blocker: <specific blocker text or ->
- Evidence: <brief evidence that supports the outcome or ->

## Verification Notes
<brief rationale tied directly to the done-condition>

Selected task:
{SelectedTask}

Execution result:
{ExecutionResult}

steps.name: persistTracker
steps.description: Write the selected task's final status and any blocker context back to the same tracker.

steps.name: stopWithOutcome
steps.description: Return the persisted loop outcome that matches the tracker state written during this run.
